requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统级安全认证 — UL 9540（钠离子）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統級安全認證 — UL 9540（鈉離子）

summary.en: Energy Storage Systems (ESS) installed in the US — regardless of battery chemistry, including sodium-ion (Na-ion) — must obtain a system-level safety listing to UL 9540 (Standard for Energy Storage Systems and Equipment) from a Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory (NRTL). UL 9540 is chemistry-agnostic: it covers the complete ESS assembly including cells, modules, power conversion, and controls. Most Authorities Having Jurisdiction (AHJs) and the National Electrical Code (NEC Article 706) require a valid UL 9540 NRTL listing before permitting installation. UL 9540 listing for a Na-ion system must be supported by cell- and module-level safety test data; UL 1973 (Batteries for Use in Stationary, Vehicle Auxiliary Power and Light Electric Rail Applications) is the principal cell/module-level standard referenced within the UL 9540 pathway and covers various chemistries. [UNVERIFIED: whether UL 1973 explicitly enumerates Na-ion as a covered chemistry or addresses it under general electrochemical cell provisions — verify with UL directly before reliance]
summary.zh: 在美国安装的储能系统（ESS）——无论电池化学体系如何，包括钠离子（Na-ion）——均须由国家认可检测实验室（NRTL）依据UL 9540（储能系统及设备标准）进行系统级安全认证。UL 9540与化学体系无关，涵盖包括电芯、模组、功率变换及控制在内的完整ESS组件。大多数有管辖权的当局（AHJ）及美国国家电气规范（NEC第706条）均要求在获准安装前取得有效的UL 9540 NRTL认证。Na-ion系统的UL 9540认证须附有电芯和模组级安全测试数据；UL 1973（固定式、车辆辅助电源及轻轨应用电池标准）是UL 9540认证路径中引用的主要电芯/模组级标准，涵盖多种化学体系。[未经核实：UL 1973是否明确将Na-ion列为涵盖化学体系，或依据通用电化学电芯条款处理——依赖前请直接向UL核实]
summary.zht: 在美國安裝的儲能系統（ESS）——無論電池化學體系如何，包括鈉離子（Na-ion）——均須由國家認可檢測實驗室（NRTL）依據UL 9540（儲能系統及設備標準）進行系統級安全認證。UL 9540與化學體系無關，涵蓋包括電芯、模組、功率轉換及控制在內的完整ESS組件。大多數有管轄權的當局（AHJ）及美國國家電氣規範（NEC第706條）均要求在獲准安裝前取得有效的UL 9540 NRTL認證。Na-ion系統的UL 9540認證須附有電芯和模組級安全測試數據；UL 1973（固定式、車輛輔助電源及輕軌應用電池標準）是UL 9540認證路徑中引用的主要電芯/模組級標準，涵蓋多種化學體系。[未經核實：UL 1973是否明確將Na-ion列為涵蓋化學體系，或依據通用電化學電芯條款處理——依賴前請直接向UL核實]

standards_or_laws: UL 9540 — Standard for Energy Storage Systems and Equipment (chemistry-agnostic, NRTL system-level listing)
UL 1973 — Standard for Batteries for Use in Stationary, Vehicle Auxiliary Power and Light Electric Rail Applications (cell/module-level; [UNVERIFIED explicit Na-ion coverage])
NEC Article 706 — Energy Storage Systems (2023 edition)

summary.en: China has published GB/T 36276-2023 (Safety Requirements for Lithium-Ion Battery for Electrical Energy Storage) as the principal stationary storage cell/module standard, but this standard is specific to lithium-ion chemistry. For sodium-ion stationary storage, China's standards landscape is still evolving: a dedicated Na-ion GB standard is understood to be under development but had not been formally issued as of mid-2026. [UNVERIFIED: confirm whether a dedicated Na-ion stationary storage GB standard has been issued; check SAC/TC21 for the latest status.] In practice, Chinese Na-ion ESS manufacturers may reference GB/T 36276 by analogy or cite emerging industry standards (e.g., T/CIAPS group standards) pending a dedicated national standard. GB/T 36558-2022 covers general technical requirements for grid-connected electrochemical ESS and is chemistry-agnostic at the system level.
summary.zh: 中国已发布GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子蓄电池安全要求）作为固定式储能电芯/模组的主要标准，但该标准仅适用于锂离子化学体系。对于固定式钠离子储能，中国标准体系仍在完善中：据悉专用Na-ion GB标准正在制定，截至2026年中尚未正式发布。[未经核实：请确认是否已有专用Na-ion固定储能GB标准发布；请向SAC/TC21查询最新状态。] 实践中，中国Na-ion ESS制造商可能参照GB/T 36276类比使用，或引用团体标准（如T/CIAPS系列）作为过渡。GB/T 36558-2022涵盖并网电化学储能系统通用技术要求，在系统层面不限定化学体系。
summary.zht: 中國已發布GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子蓄電池安全要求）作為固定式儲能電芯/模組的主要標準，但該標準僅適用於鋰離子化學體系。對於固定式鈉離子儲能，中國標準體系仍在完善中：據悉專用Na-ion GB標準正在制定，截至2026年中尚未正式發布。[未經核實：請確認是否已有專用Na-ion固定儲能GB標準發布；請向SAC/TC21查詢最新狀態。] 實踐中，中國Na-ion ESS製造商可能參照GB/T 36276類比使用，或引用團體標準（如T/CIAPS系列）作為過渡。GB/T 36558-2022涵蓋並網電化學儲能系統通用技術要求，在系統層面不限定化學體系。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子蓄电池 (lithium-ion only; no Na-ion equivalent GB standard confirmed as of 2026-06-12)
GB/T 36558-2022 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (chemistry-agnostic system-level general requirements)
[UNVERIFIED] Dedicated Na-ion stationary storage GB standard — under development per SAC/TC21 pipeline; status unconfirmed

gap.en: UL 9540 NRTL listing is required by US AHJs and NEC Article 706 for ESS installation and is not satisfied by any Chinese GB certification. Additionally, no dedicated Chinese national standard exists for Na-ion stationary storage cells/modules as of mid-2026, meaning Chinese Na-ion ESS exporters face a dual gap: (1) the system must be listed to UL 9540 by an OSHA-recognized NRTL, and (2) the cell/module-level evidence supporting that listing must satisfy UL 1973 or equivalent NRTL-accepted test data — for which no pre-existing Chinese Na-ion GB certificate can be presented. No mutual recognition agreement exists between US NRTL bodies and Chinese certification bodies for this scope.
gap.zh: 美国AHJ及NEC第706条要求ESS安装须取得UL 9540 NRTL认证，任何中国GB认证均不能满足此要求。此外，截至2026年中，中国尚无针对Na-ion固定储能电芯/模组的专用国家标准，这意味着中国Na-ion ESS出口商面临双重缺口：（1）系统须由OSHA认可的NRTL对其进行UL 9540认证；（2）支撑该认证的电芯/模组级证据须满足UL 1973或NRTL认可的同等测试数据要求——而目前不存在可供提交的Na-ion GB证书。美国NRTL机构与中国认证机构之间在此范围内不存在互认协议。
gap.zht: 美國AHJ及NEC第706條要求ESS安裝須取得UL 9540 NRTL認證，任何中國GB認證均不能滿足此要求。此外，截至2026年中，中國尚無針對Na-ion固定儲能電芯/模組的專用國家標準，這意味著中國Na-ion ESS出口商面臨雙重缺口：（1）系統須由OSHA認可的NRTL對其進行UL 9540認證；（2）支撐該認證的電芯/模組級證據須滿足UL 1973或NRTL認可的同等測試數據要求——而目前不存在可供提交的Na-ion GB證書。美國NRTL機構與中國認證機構之間在此範圍內不存在互認協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (required by most US AHJs and NEC Article 706 for permitted ESS installation; applies to all chemistries including Na-ion)
mandatory_status.cn: No mandatory Na-ion-specific national standard exists for stationary storage as of 2026-06-12; GB/T 36276-2023 is mandatory only for lithium-ion; GB/T 36558-2022 is a recommended standard

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Na-ion ESS exported from China to the US requires a UL 9540 system-level NRTL listing — this is chemistry-agnostic and mandatory for installation approval. Supporting cell/module test evidence must satisfy UL 1973 or an NRTL-accepted equivalent; no Chinese GB certificate substitutes for this. The absence of a dedicated Chinese Na-ion stationary storage national standard as of mid-2026 means there is no Chinese pre-certification that reduces the US NRTL testing burden. Engage an OSHA-recognized NRTL early in product development.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 从中国出口至美国的Na-ion ESS须取得UL 9540系统级NRTL认证——该认证与化学体系无关，是获得安装许可的强制要求。支撑电芯/模组级的测试证据须满足UL 1973或NRTL认可的同等标准；任何中国GB证书均不能替代。截至2026年中，中国尚无专用Na-ion固定储能国家标准，意味着不存在可减轻美国NRTL测试负担的中国预认证。建议在产品开发早期阶段与OSHA认可的NRTL接洽。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 從中國出口至美國的Na-ion ESS須取得UL 9540系統級NRTL認證——該認證與化學體系無關，是獲得安裝許可的強制要求。支撐電芯/模組級的測試證據須滿足UL 1973或NRTL認可的同等標準；任何中國GB證書均不能替代。截至2026年中，中國尚無專用Na-ion固定儲能國家標準，意味著不存在可減輕美國NRTL測試負擔的中國預認證。建議在產品開發早期階段與OSHA認可的NRTL接洽。

requirement_topic.zh: 电芯/模组级安全认证 — UL 1973（钠离子）
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯/模組級安全認證 — UL 1973（鈉離子）

summary.en: UL 1973 (Standard for Batteries for Use in Stationary, Vehicle Auxiliary Power and Light Electric Rail Applications) is the principal cell- and module-level safety standard referenced as supporting evidence within the UL 9540 ESS system-listing pathway. UL 1973 covers electrochemical battery systems used in stationary applications and is designed to be applicable to various battery chemistries. Whether Na-ion cells are explicitly enumerated in UL 1973 or addressed under its general electrochemical provisions has not been independently verified here. [UNVERIFIED: confirm Na-ion explicit coverage scope in UL 1973 with UL directly.] NRTL listing to UL 1973 (or equivalent cell-level evidence accepted by the NRTL) is typically required as part of the UL 9540 system listing file; without it, a UL 9540 system listing for a Na-ion ESS cannot be completed.
summary.zh: UL 1973（固定式、车辆辅助电源及轻轨应用电池标准）是UL 9540 ESS系统认证路径中作为佐证引用的主要电芯和模组级安全标准。UL 1973涵盖用于固定式应用的电化学电池系统，设计上适用于多种电池化学体系。Na-ion电芯是否在UL 1973中被明确列举，或通过其通用电化学条款加以处理，本文件未能独立核实。[未经核实：请直接向UL确认UL 1973对Na-ion的明确覆盖范围。] 通常须以UL 1973 NRTL认证（或NRTL认可的同等电芯级证据）作为UL 9540系统认证档案的一部分；若缺失，则Na-ion ESS的UL 9540系统认证无法完成。
summary.zht: UL 1973（固定式、車輛輔助電源及輕軌應用電池標準）是UL 9540 ESS系統認證路徑中作為佐證引用的主要電芯和模組級安全標準。UL 1973涵蓋用於固定式應用的電化學電池系統，設計上適用於多種電池化學體系。Na-ion電芯是否在UL 1973中被明確列舉，或通過其通用電化學條款加以處理，本文件未能獨立核實。[未經核實：請直接向UL確認UL 1973對Na-ion的明確覆蓋範圍。] 通常須以UL 1973 NRTL認證（或NRTL認可的同等電芯級證據）作為UL 9540系統認證檔案的一部分；若缺失，則Na-ion ESS的UL 9540系統認證無法完成。

standards_or_laws: UL 1973 — Standard for Batteries for Use in Stationary, Vehicle Auxiliary Power and Light Electric Rail Applications ([UNVERIFIED: explicit Na-ion chemistry scope])
UL 9540 — Standard for Energy Storage Systems and Equipment (references UL 1973 as cell/module-level supporting evidence)

summary.en: The closest Chinese equivalent for stationary storage cell/module safety is GB/T 36276-2023 (Safety Requirements for Lithium-Ion Battery for Electrical Energy Storage). However, GB/T 36276 is expressly scoped to lithium-ion chemistry and does not cover Na-ion cells. As of mid-2026, no dedicated Chinese national standard for Na-ion stationary storage cells/modules has been confirmed as formally issued. Industry group standards such as T/CIAPS series may provide interim technical references for Na-ion, but these are voluntary group standards and are not mandatory national standards. [UNVERIFIED: confirm current T/CIAPS Na-ion group standard numbers and issuance status.] Chinese GB 38031-2020 covers EV traction battery safety (lithium-ion focus) and is not applicable to stationary Na-ion ESS.
summary.zh: 与固定储能电芯/模组安全最接近的中国标准为GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子蓄电池安全要求）。然而，GB/T 36276明确适用于锂离子化学体系，不涵盖Na-ion电芯。截至2026年中，尚未确认有针对Na-ion固定储能电芯/模组的专用中国国家标准正式发布。T/CIAPS等团体标准系列可能为Na-ion提供阶段性技术参考，但这些均为自愿性团体标准，非强制国家标准。[未经核实：请确认T/CIAPS Na-ion团体标准的具体编号及发布状态。] 中国GB 38031-2020涵盖电动汽车动力蓄电池安全要求（以锂离子为主），不适用于固定式Na-ion ESS。
summary.zht: 與固定儲能電芯/模組安全最接近的中國標準為GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子蓄電池安全要求）。然而，GB/T 36276明確適用於鋰離子化學體系，不涵蓋Na-ion電芯。截至2026年中，尚未確認有針對Na-ion固定儲能電芯/模組的專用中國國家標準正式發布。T/CIAPS等團體標準系列可能為Na-ion提供階段性技術參考，但這些均為自願性團體標準，非強制國家標準。[未經核實：請確認T/CIAPS Na-ion團體標準的具體編號及發布狀態。] 中國GB 38031-2020涵蓋電動汽車動力蓄電池安全要求（以鋰離子為主），不適用於固定式Na-ion ESS。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子蓄电池 (lithium-ion only; does not cover Na-ion)
[UNVERIFIED] T/CIAPS Na-ion group standard(s) — voluntary; issuance status and numbers unconfirmed as of 2026-06-12
GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求 (EV traction batteries, not applicable to stationary Na-ion ESS)

gap.en: UL 1973 NRTL listing (or equivalent NRTL-accepted cell/module evidence) is required to support a UL 9540 system-level listing for any ESS sold in the US, including Na-ion. China has no national standard for Na-ion stationary storage cells/modules as of mid-2026, meaning a Chinese Na-ion manufacturer holds no pre-existing GB certificate that could reduce or substitute for UL 1973 NRTL testing. GB/T 36276-2023 is lithium-ion specific and is not transferable. Even if the Chinese manufacturer holds voluntary group-standard certifications for Na-ion chemistry, these are not accepted by US NRTLs as equivalent to UL 1973 listing evidence. The manufacturer must conduct fresh UL 1973 (or NRTL-equivalent) cell/module testing as part of the US market entry process.
gap.zh: 在美国销售的任何ESS（包括Na-ion）的UL 9540系统级认证均需以UL 1973 NRTL认证（或NRTL认可的同等电芯/模组证据）作为支撑。截至2026年中，中国尚无Na-ion固定储能电芯/模组的国家标准，意味着中国Na-ion制造商不持有任何可减少或替代UL 1973 NRTL测试的预有GB证书。GB/T 36276-2023为锂离子专用标准，不可移植适用。即便制造商持有Na-ion化学体系的自愿性团体标准认证，美国NRTL也不接受其作为UL 1973认证证据的等效依据。制造商须在进入美国市场的过程中重新开展UL 1973（或NRTL同等）电芯/模组测试。
gap.zht: 在美國銷售的任何ESS（包括Na-ion）的UL 9540系統級認證均需以UL 1973 NRTL認證（或NRTL認可的同等電芯/模組證據）作為支撐。截至2026年中，中國尚無Na-ion固定儲能電芯/模組的國家標準，意味著中國Na-ion製造商不持有任何可減少或替代UL 1973 NRTL測試的預有GB證書。GB/T 36276-2023為鋰離子專用標準，不可移植適用。即便製造商持有Na-ion化學體系的自願性團體標準認證，美國NRTL也不接受其作為UL 1973認證證據的等效依據。製造商須在進入美國市場的過程中重新開展UL 1973（或NRTL同等）電芯/模組測試。

mandatory_status.target: De facto mandatory as supporting evidence for UL 9540 system listing (NRTL listing to UL 1973 or NRTL-equivalent cell/module test data required; not a standalone permit requirement but a prerequisite for UL 9540 completion)
mandatory_status.cn: No mandatory Na-ion cell/module national standard for stationary storage exists in China as of 2026-06-12; GB/T 36276-2023 mandatory only for lithium-ion

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Na-ion ESS exported from China to the US must obtain NRTL listing to UL 1973 (or provide NRTL-accepted cell/module safety evidence) as a prerequisite for completing a UL 9540 system-level listing. No Chinese national standard for Na-ion stationary storage exists to reduce this burden, and GB/T 36276-2023 (lithium-ion) is not transferable. Confirm UL 1973 explicit Na-ion chemistry coverage with UL before commencing testing, as the standard may address Na-ion under general electrochemical provisions or require a chemistry-specific addendum.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 从中国出口至美国的Na-ion ESS须取得UL 1973 NRTL认证（或提供NRTL认可的电芯/模组安全证据），作为完成UL 9540系统级认证的前提条件。中国目前不存在可减轻此负担的Na-ion固定储能国家标准，且GB/T 36276-2023（锂离子）不可移植适用。在开始测试前，请直接向UL确认UL 1973对Na-ion化学体系的明确覆盖范围，因该标准可能通过通用电化学条款涵盖Na-ion，或需要特定化学体系附录。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 從中國出口至美國的Na-ion ESS須取得UL 1973 NRTL認證（或提供NRTL認可的電芯/模組安全證據），作為完成UL 9540系統級認證的前提條件。中國目前不存在可減輕此負擔的Na-ion固定儲能國家標準，且GB/T 36276-2023（鋰離子）不可移植適用。在開始測試前，請直接向UL確認UL 1973對Na-ion化學體系的明確覆蓋範圍，因該標準可能通過通用電化學條款涵蓋Na-ion，或需要特定化學體系附錄。
